title: auth-service overview
content: auth-service issues JWT tokens and validates sessions. It uses redis for session cache and communicates with user-service.

title: user-service overview
content: user-service stores user profiles in postgres and depends on auth-service for identity checks.

title: payment-service overview
content: payment-service handles card charges, depends on auth-service and user-service, and sends events to notification-service.

title: notification-service overview
content: notification-service delivers email and sms notifications and depends on api-gateway for inbound API traffic.

title: api-gateway overview
content: api-gateway routes public requests to auth-service, user-service, payment-service, and notification-service.

title: session-service note
content: session-service renews login sessions and uses redis plus auth-service token validation.

title: incident 2024-03 auth outage
content: auth-service outage caused payment failures and login errors for api-gateway. Root cause was redis saturation.

title: incident 2024-04 payment timeout
content: payment-service timed out when user-service latency increased. notification-service backlog increased after retries.

title: incident 2024-05 gateway spikes
content: api-gateway saw 5xx spikes when auth-service returned token validation errors.

title: runbook redis outage
content: if redis is down, auth-service and session-service are affected. Degrade to stateless auth mode and scale api-gateway read timeout.

title: runbook payment failures
content: if payment-service fails, inspect auth-service token checks and user-service latency before restarting workers.

title: runbook notification lag
content: if notification-service lag grows, check payment-service retry rate and queue depth.

title: component redis cache
content: redis cache is used by auth-service and session-service for token/session lookup.

title: component postgres
content: postgres primary database is used by user-service and payment-service for durable records.

title: dependency map note
content: payment-service communicates with notification-service and depends on auth-service for user authorization.

title: incident 2024-06 redis packet loss
content: redis packet loss increased auth-service latency and caused api-gateway retries.

title: runbook blast radius
content: for blast radius analysis start from failed component, traverse depends_on edges, then list incidents touching those services.
